computed.name: Maps
computed.formula:
const coord = this.COORDINATES_OUTPUT;
const array = coord ? coord.REAL_COORDS.split(",") : "";


return `<iframe 
  width="80%" 
  height="300" 
  frameborder="0" 
  scrolling="no" 
  marginheight="0" 
  marginwidth="0" 
  src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=${array[0]},${array[1]}&hl=es&z=14&output=embed"
 >
 </iframe>
 `

computed.name: COORDINATES
computed.formula:
const coords = this.COORDINATES_OUTPUT;
return coords ? coords.DISPLAY_COORDS : "" ;

computed.name: Get list of markets and calculated values
computed.formula:
/*
* Get list of markets and calculated values
* By Diego Tapia
*/

let CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP = this.CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP
let CQP_STOCK_MAX_EXP = this.CQP_STOCK_MAX_EXP
let CQP_STORAGE_EEL = this._parent._parent.CQP_STORAGE_EEL
let CQP_STORAGE_AGG = this._parent._parent.CQP_STORAGE_AGG
let CQP_EEL_LIMIT_SHARE_USD = this._parent._parent.CQP_EEL_LIMIT_SHARE_USD
let CQP_CAT_LIMIT_SHARE_USD = this._parent._parent.CQP_CAT_LIMIT_SHARE_USD
let CQP_TOTAL_FORTE_SHARE = this._parent._parent.CQP_TOTAL_FORTE_SHARE
let market = []

// Format table of markets by address
this._parent._parent.CQP_MARKETS.forEach( function(element) {

    if (element.taken) {
        let tempMarket = {
            CQP_REINSURER: element.CQP_REINSURER,
            CQP_FORTE_SHARE: element.CQP_FORTE_SHARE,
            CQP_AXA: element.CQP_AXA,
            CQP_AUSTRAL_RETENTION: element.CQP_AUSTRAL_RETENTION,
            CQP_STORAGE_EEL: CQP_STORAGE_EEL,
            CQP_STORAGE_AGG: CQP_STORAGE_AGG,
            CQP_EEL_LIMIT_REINSURER_SHARE_USD: element.CQP_EEL_LIMIT_SHARE_USD,
            CQP_CAT_LIMIT_REINSURER_SHARE_USD: element.CQP_CAT_LIMIT_SHARE_USD,
            CAP_STOCK_MAX_EXP_REINSURER_SHARE: ((element.CQP_FORTE_SHARE/100) * CQP_STOCK_MAX_EXP),
            CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP_SCOR_SHARE: ((element.CQP_FORTE_SHARE/100) * CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP)

        }
        
        market.push(tempMarket)
    }
})

// Set default Forte Market
let tempMarket = {
    CQP_REINSURER: "FORTE",
    CQP_FORTE_SHARE: this._parent._parent.CQP_TOTAL_FORTE_SHARE,
    CQP_AXA: 0,
    CQP_AUSTRAL_RETENTION: 0,
    CQP_STORAGE_EEL: CQP_STORAGE_EEL,
    CQP_STORAGE_AGG: CQP_STORAGE_AGG,
    CQP_EEL_LIMIT_REINSURER_SHARE_USD: CQP_EEL_LIMIT_SHARE_USD,
    CQP_CAT_LIMIT_REINSURER_SHARE_USD: CQP_CAT_LIMIT_SHARE_USD,
    CAP_STOCK_MAX_EXP_REINSURER_SHARE: ((CQP_TOTAL_FORTE_SHARE/100) * CQP_STOCK_MAX_EXP),
    CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP_SCOR_SHARE: ((CQP_TOTAL_FORTE_SHARE/100) * CQP_STOCK_AVERAGE_EXP)

}

market.push(tempMarket)

return market

script.code:
<?php 
/*

 *  To access Configuration Data use $config

 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

 return [];
